case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. CONCEPCION LOPEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-02-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ATTORNEY DECLARATION RE: COST ( CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE ) (TRANSACTION ID # 100124289) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CONCEPCION DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2019

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $550.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100124289) AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CONCEPCION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-02-2021 CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100124289) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-08-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044640), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED APR-20-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-22-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CONCEPCION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CONCEPCION $703.65 PRINCIPAL, $293.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $997.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100124289)
